name: repo-ops
description: Baseline maintainer dev flow as config-driven skills: create-pr (opens PRs only after running the repo's format/lint/build/test pre-flight), code-review, daily-changelog (one markdown file per day from merged PRs), and daily-update (runs the repo's per-day housekeeping skills and bundles their output into one PR). Reads .claude/maintainerd.json.
